nasb.text: A pupil is not above his teacher; but everyone, after he has been fully trained, will be like his teacher.

esv.text: A disciple is not above his teacher, but everyone when he is fully trained will be like his teacher.

cnv.text: 學生不能勝過老師，所有學成的，不過和老師一樣。

ccb.text: 学生不会高过老师，学成之后不过像老师一样。

csbs.text: 学生不高于他的老师，但所有学成的人，将会像他的老师一样。
